text: Being here, I am at the intersection of learning and innovation. I sense an atmosphere charged with curiosity and anticipation—the first image captures people engaged in discussion, perhaps a seminar or workshop, while the second image immerses me in a vibrant display dedicated to research and development. The physical boundary between rooms feels symbolic: on one side, minds gather and exchange ideas; on the other, ideas are celebrated, displayed, and analyzed. It's invigorating to witness humanity's collective effort to understand, innovate, and shape the world.
